hero.title: Transforming Healthcare Access in Nigeria
hero.description: We believe everyone deserves access to quality healthcare. Our mission is to bridge the gap between patients and providers through technology.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize healthcare access in Nigeria through AI-powered tools that help patients find the right care, at the right time, from trusted providers.

values.title: Patient-First
values.description: Every decision we make starts with one question: how does this help patients get better care? Your health journey is our priority.

values.title: Trust & Security
values.description: Your health data is sacred. We maintain HIPAA compliance, use bank-grade encryption, and never sell your information.

values.title: Accessibility
values.description: Quality healthcare shouldn't depend on your location or income. We're building tools that work for everyone, everywhere in Nigeria.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We leverage AI and technology not to replace doctors, but to help them deliver better care. Innovation serves humanity.

values.title: Community
values.description: We collaborate with hospitals, doctors, and emergency services across Nigeria. Healthcare is a team effort.

values.title: Impact
values.description: We measure success by lives improved. Every feature we build aims to make a meaningful difference in Nigerian healthcare.

team.name: Dr. Amina Yusuf
team.bio: Former Director of Emergency Medicine at Lagos General Hospital. 15+ years in healthcare leadership.

team.name: Chukwuemeka Okonkwo
team.bio: Serial entrepreneur with exits in fintech and logistics. Passionate about solving healthcare access challenges.

team.name: Dr. Fatima Ibrahim
team.bio: Healthcare UX researcher. Led product at multiple health tech startups across Africa.

milestones.title: Founded in Lagos
milestones.description: Started with a vision to solve healthcare access challenges in Nigeria through AI-powered technology.

milestones.title: 10,000 Patients Served
milestones.description: Reached our first major milestone, proving that better healthcare coordination saves lives.

milestones.title: Hospital Partnerships
milestones.description: Partnered with 50+ hospitals across Lagos, Abuja, and Port Harcourt.

milestones.title: Emergency Dispatch Launch
milestones.description: Launched real-time ambulance tracking and emergency response coordination.

milestones.title: 50,000+ Patients
milestones.description: Growing rapidly with doctors, hospitals, and dispatchers joining the platform.
